text:
Author: cs
Date: Sun May 18 19:01:19 2014
New Revision: 354448
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354448
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354448/

Log:
  Very minor update to /usr/ports/LEGAL to resolve discrepancy with make -VLEGAL.
  
  PR:		ports/189094
  Submitted by:	Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/LEGAL

Modified: head/LEGAL
==============================================================================
--- head/LEGAL	Sun May 18 18:34:03 2014	(r354447)
+++ head/LEGAL	Sun May 18 19:01:19 2014	(r354448)
@@ -208,7 +208,7 @@ quake4-linux-*		games/linux-quake4	Redis
 quake4-linux-*		games/linux-quake4-demo	Redistribution is limited; see the license
 Radiator/*		net/radiator		Commercial software
 RakNet-*		devel/raknet		Special authorization granted to distribute version 3.x under GPLv3
-rapid-*			math/rapid		No commercial use
+rapid-*			math/rapid		For any commercial purpose, you must request a license from http://www.cs.unc.edu/~geom/OBB/OBBT.html
 raproxy*.tar.gz		audio/raproxy		License allows only use in a firewall, or with RA products
 rarbsd-*		archivers/rar		only unmodified original package can be distributed
 RealPlayer-*.rpm	multimedia/linux-realplayer Redistribution not allowed
